title: Abyssal Shop
description: This Is A Simple Plugin With A Currency And Shop, Auction House, Sell, Gamble, And Operator Commands Such As /givemoney /setmoney /takemoney and also /pay
body:
# BUG FIXES :
**Fixed The Missing Enchants.**


**/balance, /bal, /money — View your balance
/pay <player> <amount> — Send money to another player
/daily — Claim your daily reward
/shop — Open the main shop GUI
/sell — Open the sell inventory
/orders — View your shop orders
/buyxp — Open the XP purchase menu
/stocks — Open the stock investment market
/spawners — Open the passive income spawner shop
/ah — Open the auction house
/ah sell <price> — Sell the item in your hand on the auction house
/sidebar <title> — Change the sidebar scoreboard title**
/stocks , /stocks view , /stocks claim - Invest In Items

Admin Commands:
/setmoney <player> <amount> — Set a player's balance
/givemoney <player> <amount> — Give money to a player
/takemoney <player> <amount> — Remove money from a player
/giverole <player> <color> <role> — Assign a custom role tag (For <role> you can write King_Knight For [King Knight] Or Knight For [Knight] The [] Are Added Automatically

**This Plugin Can Be Combined With The "LifestealZ Plugin" So That You Can Buy Hearts From The Shop** **Unless DO NOT Buy The Hearts** **Im Warning You Lol**
 
# Abyssal Shop

A powerful all-in-one economy and shop system designed for modern Minecraft servers.

Abyssal Shop is a complete economy plugin built for servers that want a fully interactive, GUI-based shop experience with advanced systems like limited stock markets, investments, player spawners, auctions, XP purchasing, and more. It is designed to feel natural in Minecraft while giving server owners powerful tools to create a balanced and engaging economy.

Unlike simple shop plugins, Abyssal Shop focuses on immersion and gameplay depth. Players interact with inventory-based menus, invest in item markets, earn passive income, and progress through shop levels while enjoying a polished UI and responsive system.

The plugin is built for Paper / Spigot 1.21+ and is optimized for performance even on large servers.

The entire system is powered by a robust codebase that includes advanced mechanics such as rarity-based stock resets, investment markets, GUI interactions, passive income systems, and multiple economic loops working together to keep the server economy active.

Main Features
Full GUI Shop System

Abyssal Shop provides a beautiful chest-GUI shop interface where players can browse and purchase items easily.

Features include:

Category based browsing

Search functionality

Instant item purchases

Stock availability display

Dynamic pricing display

Sell prices for items

Pagination system

Interactive item previews

Players can browse categories like:

Tools

Blocks

Food

Armor

Weapons

Potions

Enchantments

Redstone

Special items

Miscellaneous items

Everything is done through clean Minecraft inventories, so players never need complicated commands.

Limited Stock System

One of the core features of Abyssal Shop is its rarity-based stock system.

Every item has a rarity tier:

Common

Uncommon

Rare

Legendary

Mythic

Each tier has its own limited stock pool that resets every 12 hours.

Example stock sizes:

Common items
→ ~5000 per cycle

Uncommon items
→ ~4500 per cycle

Rare items
→ ~2000 per cycle

Legendary items
→ ~1000 per cycle

Mythic items
→ extremely limited quantities

This prevents players from endlessly buying powerful items and helps keep the server economy stable and competitive.

Shop Level System

Players automatically gain Shop Levels as they spend money in the shop.

Each level unlocks bigger discounts on future purchases.

Example progression:

Level 1
→ No discount

Level 2
→ 3% discount

Level 5
→ 14% discount

Level 10
→ 35% discount

This system rewards active players and encourages long-term progression in the economy.

Stocks Investment System

Players can invest money into items using the /stocks system.

When players buy items from the shop, those purchases increase the demand for that item.

Investors earn money based on how many times that item was bought during the cycle.

Example:

Player invests in Diamond Blocks

During the next 12 hours:

40 diamond blocks are purchased

Investor receives profit based on those purchases.

This creates a player-driven stock market that rewards strategy and timing.

Passive Income Spawners

Abyssal Shop includes a passive income system where players can place special spawners that generate money automatically.

Spawner tiers:

Common
→ generates passive income every minute

Uncommon
→ higher income generation

Mythic
→ extremely powerful passive generator

Players simply place the spawner in the world and it will begin generating money periodically.

This system provides a late-game economy goal for players.

Auction House

Players can sell items directly to other players through the auction house.

Features include:

GUI browsing

player listings

instant purchases

persistent storage

fair price trading

This allows a player-driven marketplace in addition to the main server shop.

XP Purchase System

Players can purchase experience levels through a GUI.

Command:

/buyxp

Players can choose how many levels they want and purchase them instantly using in-game currency.

Playtime Tracking

The plugin tracks how long players have played on the server.

Playtime is used in:

scoreboards

statistics

progression systems

This allows servers to reward active players or create additional systems based on time played.

Passive Interest System

Players earn interest on their balance over time.

If a player holds money in their account, they will periodically receive small interest rewards.

This encourages saving money and keeps the economy flowing naturally.

Daily Rewards

Players can claim a daily reward every 24 hours.

Rewards may include:

money

items

rare drops

useful materials

This encourages players to log in daily.

Lifesteal Heart Support

The shop supports custom heart items compatible with lifesteal style servers.

Players can purchase hearts which permanently increase their health when used.

This is perfect for Lifesteal SMP style servers.

WCash Physical Currency

Abyssal Shop includes a physical currency system.

Money can be turned into items that represent cash which players can trade or store.

This makes trading more interactive and allows creative server mechanics.

Sidebar Scoreboard

The plugin automatically displays a live scoreboard showing important player information such as:

Balance

Playtime

Server branding

Other statistics

Admins can customize the scoreboard title using:

/sidebar <title>

Custom Player Roles

Admins can assign custom role tags that appear in chat.

These tags allow servers to create unique ranks and identities for players.

Example:

[Knight]
[Merchant]
[Explorer]

Roles appear next to the player’s name in chat.

Admin Commands

Abyssal Shop includes powerful administrative tools for server staff.

Examples:

/setmoney <player> <amount>
Set a player's balance.

/givemoney <player> <amount>
Give money to a player.

/takemoney <player> <amount>
Remove money from a player.

/sidebar <title>
Change the scoreboard title.

These commands allow staff to easily manage the economy and assist players.

Built for Performance

The plugin is designed to run efficiently on modern servers.

Features include:

optimized data structures

asynchronous processing where possible

efficient inventory handling

minimal lag impact

Even with large economies and many players interacting with the system, performance remains stable.

Perfect For

Abyssal Shop works great for servers such as:

Survival SMPs

Economy servers

Lifesteal servers

PvE progression servers

Community SMPs

Modded survival worlds

If you want a deep and engaging economy, this plugin provides everything needed.

Requirements

Server Software
Paper / Spigot

Minecraft Version
1.21+

Summary

Abyssal Shop is not just a shop plugin.

It is a complete economic ecosystem with trading, investing, progression, and passive income systems that make the server economy feel alive.

Players can:

buy and sell items

invest in markets

run auctions

earn passive income

progress through shop levels

participate in a living economy

All through a clean, intuitive Minecraft GUI experience.

If you'd like, I can also help you write:

A Modrinth README with formatting

plugin.yml description

a shorter Modrinth summary

tags and categories to rank higher on Modrinth.

give me all the commands

Below is a clean list of all player and admin commands available in your plugin based on the code in Code.txt.

You can paste this directly into your Modrinth page under a "Commands" section.

Commands
Economy Commands
/balance

Shows your current balance.

Aliases

/bal
/money

Example

/bal
/pay <player> <amount>

Send money to another player.

Supports shorthand numbers.

Examples:

/pay Steve 1000
/pay Alex 5k
/pay Bob 2m

Shorthand formats:

1k = 1,000
1m = 1,000,000
1b = 1,000,000,000
1t = 1,000,000,000,000
1qt = 1 quadrillion
/daily

Claim your daily reward.

Rewards may include:

money

items

rare materials

Cooldown: 24 hours

Shop Commands
/shop

Opens the main shop GUI.

Players can:

browse items

buy items

view stock

search categories

/sell

Opens the sell inventory.

Players place items inside the GUI to sell them.

/orders

Shows your current shop orders.

Orders include:

purchased items

pending deliveries

order history

/buyxp

Opens the XP shop GUI.

Players can purchase experience levels using money.

Price:

$5000 per XP level
Stock Market Commands
/stocks

Opens the stock investment menu.

Players can invest money into items.

When other players buy those items, investors earn profit.

Features:

12 hour investment cycles

dynamic returns

interest scaling

player-driven market

Spawner Commands
/spawners

Opens the spawner shop.

Players can purchase income spawners that generate passive money.

Spawner tiers:

Common
Uncommon
Mythic

Spawners generate money every minute.

Auction House
/ah

Opens the auction house GUI.

Players can browse listings from other players.

/ah sell <price>

List the item in your hand on the auction house.

Example:

/ah sell 50000
Role Commands
/giverole <player> <color> <role>

Assign a custom role tag to a player.

Example:

/giverole Steve gold Knight
/giverole Alex aqua Trader

Role appears in chat like:

[Knight] Steve
Scoreboard Command
/sidebar <title>

Changes the sidebar scoreboard title.

Example

/sidebar Abyssal SMP
Admin Commands

These commands require OP or admin permissions.

/setmoney <player> <amount>

Set a player's balance.

Example

/setmoney Steve 500000
/givemoney <player> <amount>

Give money to a player.

Example

/givemoney Alex 10000
/takemoney <player> <amount>

Remove money from a player.

Example

/takemoney Steve 5000
Additional Features

The plugin also includes many gameplay systems tied to commands and GUIs such as:

shop leveling

limited item stock

passive income spawners

auction house trading

daily rewards

interest on balances

playtime tracking

physical currency items

These systems run automatically and enhance the overall server economy.
